title: The most insane week in AI
summary: AI Search reviews a week of major AI releases including DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, GPT 5.5, GPT Images 2, and Qwen 3.6. The video covers multiple research projects and model releases across vision, language, and robotics domains.
